data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizing options to enhance user decision-making speeds.
data.technical_spec: Simplified UI and intuitive navigation menus.

data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Optimization of clickable elements for ease of access.
data.technical_spec: Enlarged touch targets and consideration for thumb zones on mobile.

data.title: The Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: The design is created to look appealing while maintaining functionality.
data.technical_spec: Modern visual design languages and animations.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Building user experience based on familiar patterns found across similar apps.
data.technical_spec: UI that follows common social media app design norms.

data.title: Peak-End Rule
data.description: Creating memorable user experiences by focusing on key interactions.
data.technical_spec: Optimizing important interactions like posting and messaging.
